people.name: Alex Rivera
people.notes: Fictional sample patient. The 2025-2026 story follows elevated blood pressure, LDL, A1c, vitamin D deficiency, sleep debt, and a gradual improvement after primary care follow-up, nutrition counseling, and home wearable tracking.

people.name: Maya Rivera
people.notes: Fictional sample child profile. Spring records focus on peanut allergy planning, seasonal congestion, soccer activity, and a mild ankle sprain recovery.

allergies.notes: Avoid unless reviewed by clinician. Reaction recorded in college.
No respiratory symptoms recorded. Keeps antihistamine available when traveling.
School nurse has action plan copy and epinephrine authorization.
Worse after soccer practice in April and May.
Pediatrician advised allergy evaluation before future use.

medications.name: Lisinopril
medications.notes: Takes in the morning; home readings are logged in wearables.

medications.name: Atorvastatin
medications.notes: Stopped after muscle aches were reviewed with clinician; lifestyle trial documented in notes.

medications.name: Ibuprofen
medications.notes: Short course after hike; no longer taking.

medications.name: Magnesium supplement
medications.notes: Imported from old note with incomplete details to demonstrate Unknown status.

medications.name: Epinephrine auto-injector
medications.frequency: Use as directed for severe allergic reaction
medications.notes: One device at home and one at school.

medications.name: Albuterol inhaler
medications.notes: Used before soccer practice per pediatric plan.

medications.name: Amoxicillin
medications.notes: Completed before rash history was reviewed.

lab_results.notes: Still borderline elevated at winter follow-up.
Improved after walking and meal planning.
Improving but still above reference range.
Near reference range; still flagged high.
Likely hemolyzed sample; repeat ordered immediately.
Kidney function reference for blood pressure medication monitoring.
Drawn during viral symptoms; repeat later if clinician wants.
Same-day urgent clinic evaluation after chest pain note.
Missing reference range to test data-gap insights.
Used for allergy-plan discussion, not diagnosis in this app.

health_entries.title: Annual labs ordered
health_entries.note: Baseline labs scheduled after several elevated home blood pressure readings.

health_entries.title: Fatigue with short sleep week
health_entries.note: Noted five nights under six hours of sleep during work deadline.

health_entries.title: Home blood pressure trending high
health_entries.note: Several evening readings in the mid-130s systolic before primary care follow-up.

health_entries.title: Knee soreness after hike
health_entries.note: Improved with rest over several days; ibuprofen course completed.

health_entries.title: Walking routine started
health_entries.note: Began 20-30 minute walks most weekdays after January lab review.

health_entries.title: Mild shortness of breath during stairs
health_entries.note: Resolved after rest. No chest pain recorded on this date.

health_entries.title: Headache after poor sleep
health_entries.note: Tracked hydration and sleep; improved the next day.

health_entries.title: Chest pain during stressful commute
health_entries.note: Called clinic triage and was evaluated the same day; troponin was normal in this fictional sample.

health_entries.title: Viral congestion and low energy
health_entries.note: Rested at home; hs-CRP drawn during this period.

health_entries.title: Energy improved with better sleep
health_entries.note: Seven-hour sleep streak coincided with fewer headaches.

health_entries.title: Reviewed home readings before follow-up
health_entries.note: Most recent home blood pressure readings are lower than January.

health_entries.title: Missed dental cleaning
health_entries.note: Calendar conflict; reminder added to reschedule.

health_entries.title: Wheezing during soccer warmup
health_entries.note: Pediatrician provided exercise plan and inhaler instructions.

health_entries.title: Seasonal congestion after soccer
health_entries.note: Worse after outdoor practice on high pollen days.

health_entries.title: Accidental peanut exposure
health_entries.note: Hives and stomach pain resolved after family followed existing action plan and contacted clinician.

health_entries.title: Rolled ankle at soccer
health_entries.note: Mild swelling; improved with rest and school athletic trainer check.

health_entries.title: Returned to light practice
health_entries.note: No swelling after warmup; continued ankle exercises.

appointments.title: Primary care lab review
appointments.notes: Reviewed LDL, A1c, vitamin D, sleep, and home blood pressure readings.

appointments.title: Same-day chest pain evaluation
appointments.notes: Evaluation recorded after chest pain timeline entry; fictional troponin result was normal.

appointments.title: Primary care follow-up
appointments.notes: Discussed LDL trend, vitamin D response, and home blood pressure logs.

appointments.title: Cardiology consult
appointments.notes: Bring April urgent-care note, potassium repeat, and home BP readings.

appointments.title: Nutrition consult
appointments.notes: Bring recent labs and food log.

appointments.title: Sleep medicine consult
appointments.notes: Discuss sleep duration, morning headaches, and wearable sleep logs.

appointments.title: Dental cleaning
appointments.notes: Missed visit created a reschedule reminder.

appointments.title: Allergy check-in
appointments.notes: Reviewed peanut plan, school forms, and pollen symptoms.

appointments.title: Ankle recheck
appointments.notes: Trainer recommended pediatric review if pain returns with practice.

reminders.title: Repeat potassium after critical flag
reminders.notes: Repeat came back normal after possible hemolyzed sample.

reminders.title: Send home BP log to primary care
reminders.notes: Intentionally overdue for dashboard and insights testing.

reminders.title: Refill lisinopril
reminders.notes: Check remaining tablets before cardiology visit.

reminders.title: Pack BP log for cardiology
reminders.notes: Bring readings from January through May.

reminders.title: Replace home cuff batteries
reminders.notes: Old reminder kept to demonstrate dismissed status.

reminders.title: Check epinephrine expiration dates
reminders.notes: Verify one at home and one at school.

reminders.title: Complete ankle exercise log
reminders.notes: Trainer reviewed log after return to light practice.

reminders.title: Keep pollen diary
reminders.notes: Stopped after allergy visit because symptoms improved.
